description.value:
You grew up on Eox or spent a significant amount of time there learning about the macabre customs and decadent culture of the grave world. Perhaps you're a survivor of the Hall of the Living, an Arcanamirium exchange student learning necromantic magic in Pact Port, or an aspiring necrovite's apprentice hoping for a chance at immortality.

Choose two attribute boosts. One must be Charisma or Constitution, and one is a free attribute boost.

You're trained in the Society skill and the Eoxian Lore skill. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Streetwise] skill feat.

publication.title: Starfinder Guilt of the Grave World
